attacking_style: Launches powerful solo attacks on steep gradients (20% walls) with 8km remaining, then holds margins on technical descents. Also excels in explosive uphill finishes like Cauberg, timing final efforts within 300m.
team_tactics: Minimal team reliance visible; operates independently in selective groups or wind splits. Positioning himself in critical front selections (47-rider groups) appears self-managed.
terrain_preference: Excels on punchy, steep climbs (20% grades) combined with technical descents, and explosive uphill sprint finishes. Multiple Amstel wins confirm mastery of short, sharp Ardennes-style terrain with decisive late selections.
vulnerability: Sustained climbing against pure GC riders exposes limitations (large time loss to Contador). Long-range attacks (66km) fail to produce results, suggesting better suited to late, explosive efforts than extended breakaways.
key_patterns: Attacks on extreme gradient walls (20%+) with 8km or less remaining, multiple observations.
Holds off chasers on technical descents after steep climb attacks, shown in Vuelta stage.
Wins from selective group sprints after late attacks faded, quality sprint from small groups.
Exceptional late-season form at age 37+, out-of-saddle sprinting on brutal gradients pre-Worlds.
Course mastery on specific routes (4 Amstel wins referenced), confirms repeat success formula.
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent observation (2021 Tour) shows continued aggression but ineffective long-range efforts suggest declining explosive power compared to earlier late-season peak form in 2019.
